language.name: xpath
language.title: XPath
language.description: Evaluates an XPath expression against an XML payload.
language.label: language,core,xml

expression.description: The expression value in your chosen language syntax.

documentType.label: advanced
documentType.description: Name of class for document type. The default value is org.w3c.dom.Document.

resultQName.description: Sets the output type supported by XPath.

factoryRef.label: advanced
factoryRef.description: References to a custom XPathFactory to lookup in the registry.

objectModel.label: advanced
objectModel.description: The XPath object model to use.

logNamespaces.label: advanced
logNamespaces.description: Whether to log namespaces which can assist during troubleshooting.

threadSafety.label: advanced
threadSafety.description: Whether to enable thread-safety for the returned result of the xpath expression. This applies to when using NODESET as the result type, and the returned set has multiple elements.

preCompile.label: advanced
preCompile.description: Whether to enable pre-compiling the xpath expression during initialization phase. pre-compile is enabled by default.

namespace.label: common
namespace.description: Injects the XML Namespaces of prefix to uri mappings.

source.description: Source to use, instead of message body. You can prefix with variable:, header:, or property: to specify kind of source. Otherwise, the source is assumed to be a variable. Use empty or null to use default source, which is the message body.

resultType.description: The class of the result type (type from output).

trim.label: advanced
trim.description: Whether to trim the source code to remove leading and trailing whitespaces and line breaks.
